headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Outperform on Assurant, Raises Price Target to $270
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Tommy McJoynt   maintains Assurant (NYSE:AIZ) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $258 to $270.
